meta.title: My Haircut is so Simple, It's AI-Ready 🤷‍♂️
meta.description:
Andrew Ng shares why his haircut might be the only one a robot could actually pull off. A fun look at the lighter side of AI capabilities (and limitations!).

At AI Dev, we bring together people building, learning, and contributing to real AI systems—and having a little fun along the way.

We’ll continue these conversations at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29.

Tickets available: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
